snippet.title: MORBIUS - Final Trailer (HD)
snippet.description:
Let go of what you used to be. Discover who you’re meant to be. Watch the final trailer now. #Morbius is exclusively in movie theaters April 1.

Visit our Site: https://www.morbius.movie

Subscribe to Sony Pictures for exclusive content: http://bit.ly/SonyPicsSubscribe  

Follow MORBIUS on Social: 
https://www.facebook.com/morbiusmovie  
https://twitter.com/morbiusmovie 
https://www.instagram.com/morbiusmovie 
https://www.discord.gg/Morbius

One of the most compelling and conflicted characters in Sony Pictures Universe of Marvel Characters comes to the big screen as Oscar® winner Jared Leto transforms into the enigmatic antihero Michael Morbius. Dangerously ill with a rare blood disorder and determined to save others suffering his same fate, Dr. Morbius attempts a desperate gamble. While at first it seems to be a radical success, a darkness inside him is unleashed. Will good override evil – or will Morbius succumb to his mysterious new urges?

Directed by: Daniel Espinosa
 
Screen Story and Screenplay by: Matt Sazama & Burk Sharpless
 
Based on the Marvel Comics
 
Produced by:
Avi Arad
Matt Tolmach
Lucas Foster

Cast:
Jared Leto
Matt Smith
Adria Arjona
Jared Harris
Al Madrigal
with Tyrese Gibson

#JaredLeto #OfficialTrailer #SonyPictures #Sony #Trailer #MattSmith #AdriaArjona #JaredHarris #AlMadrigal #TyreseGibson #MichaelMorbius #Marvel #MarvelComics
